prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock turbocharger on the **Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi (G4KN)** with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** (84 trim, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) for a targeted 320-340 WHP on E30 fuel, paired with a **PTP Turbo Inlet Pipe (TIP) in 3.5" silicone** to reduce restriction. Requires **Hyundai-specific turbo manifold gasket (OEM P/N 28313-G4KN0)** to prevent boost leaks.

Fuel System: Upgrade to **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** (1050cc) injectors with **Radium Engineering fuel rail spacers** to accommodate the larger flow rate, paired with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** and **AEM 340026 fuel pressure regulator** to maintain 58-60 psi under boost. Requires **Hyundai Tucson N Line-specific fuel line adapters (PTP P/N HYU-TUC-001)** for seamless integration.

ECU & Tuning: **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU** with **Hyundai Tucson N Line-specific base map (Syvecs P/N SYV-TUC-G25T-01)**, calibrated for **93 octane + E30 blend** with **closed-loop knock control** and **individual cylinder fuel trimming**. Includes **Syvecs CAN bus expansion module** for OEM integration (e.g., N Line drive modes, stability control). Requires **dyno tuning with a Hyundai G2.5 T-GDi specialist (e.g., Eurocharged or Unleashed Tuning)** for optimal AFR targeting (11.8:1 under full load).
estetica: Aero: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (P/N RB-HYU-TUC-03)** for the Tucson N Line, featuring **carbon fiber front fenders (25mm extended per side)**, **rear quarter panels (30mm extended)**, and **custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser** with **integrated Gurney flap**. Includes **Rocket Bunny-specific front splitter (20mm overhang)** and **rear wing (dual-element, 1200mm span)** in **dry carbon fiber (2x2 twill)** for reduced weight.

Wheels & Suspension: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear)** in **Gloss Black with red lip**, paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear)**. Suspension: **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (P/N DFV-HYU-TUC-01)** with **30-way adjustable compression/rebound damping**, **20mm adjustable ride height**, and **N Line-specific spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)**. Includes **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, P/N BSR75Z)** and **polyurethane subframe bushings (SuperPro P/N SPF1001K)** for reduced deflection.

Exterior & Interior: **Seibon Carbon fiber hood (P/N CF-HYU-TUC-01, 30% weight reduction)** with **hidden tow hooks (OEM Hyundai N Line tow hook covers, P/N 81240-G4KN0)**. **VMR Carbon fiber mirror caps (P/N VMR701-CF)** and **custom N Line-specific side skirts (3D-printed ABS, 15mm lower than OEM)**. Interior: **Recaro Sportster CS (P/N 391.20.24) front seats** with **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (P/N 41400A)**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub (P/N NRG-101BK)**, and **Hyundai N Line-specific shift knob (OEM P/N 46310-G4KN0) wrapped in Alcantara (Rally Innovations P/N RI-ALC-001)**.
